mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, username, role, module, action, detail, ip, create_time FROM operation_log ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id, username, role, module, action, detail, ip, create_time FROM operation_log ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT id, user_id, username, role, module, action, detail, ip, create_time FROM operation_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id, username, role, module, action, detail, ip, create_time FROM operation_log WHERE module = #{module} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_log (user_id, username, role, module, action, detail, ip) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{role}, #{module}, #{action}, #{detail}, #{ip})
